faq_section.header_subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services
faq_section.q1_question: How long does it take to build a website?
faq_section.q1_answer: 1-2 weeks depending on what needs to happen. Simple websites start faster, while complex projects with integrations take longer.
faq_section.q2_answer: Yes! We offer support with all projects including updates, security patches, and performance optimization.
faq_section.q3_question: Can I expand my website later?
faq_section.q3_answer: Absolutely. We build scalable solutions from day one. Adding new features, integrations, or pages is straightforward with our modular approach.
faq_section.q4_question: Do you guarantee Google first page ranking?
faq_section.q4_answer: We don't guarantee rankings, but we implement proven SEO strategies. Our clients typically see top positions within 3-6 months for targeted keywords.
faq_section.q5_question: How does AI automation help my business?
faq_section.q5_answer: AI automation handles repetitive tasks: customer support, lead qualification, booking scheduling, form responses. This saves time while improving customer experience and conversion rates.
faq_section.q6_answer: We support English, Spanish, Italian, and Dutch. We can build multilingual websites and chatbots for your audience.

reviews_section.header_subtitle: Businesses worldwide have grown with our solutions
reviews_section.review1_text: Solon Digital completely transformed our business. In 3 months, we tripled our bookings. Excellent customer service and the automation works perfectly.
reviews_section.review2_text: The AI automation they implemented is incredible. Now I receive qualified leads automatically. In two months I closed 5 sales that I wouldn't have been able to make otherwise.
reviews_section.review3_text: Professional, efficient and results-oriented. They truly understand the local Tenerife market. My website now appears on Google's first page. Highly recommended!

cost_of_waiting.title: The Cost of Waiting
cost_of_waiting.subtitle: Every day you delay is a day your competitors gain ground.
cost_of_waiting.painpoint1_description: Every day your site is slow, 40% of your visitors bounce to a competitor. That's pure profit walking out the door.
cost_of_waiting.painpoint2_description: Managing bookings via WhatsApp and manual calls is a full-time job you shouldn't have. We automate the grind.
cost_of_waiting.painpoint3_description: If you aren't on page 1 of Google, you don't exist for the 100,000+ tourists searching for your service right now.
cost_of_waiting.cta_text: Schedule your growth audit today. Let's show you exactly what you're losing.

hidden_cost.title: Every day you wait is a day your competition wins.
hidden_cost.subtitle: A slow, outdated website isn't just an eyesore—it's a profit killer.
hidden_cost.pillar1_description: While your site struggles to load, your potential clients are already booking with the competitor next door. You aren't just losing a click; you're losing a lifetime customer.
hidden_cost.pillar2_description: Still handling every booking and question manually? That's 10+ hours a week stolen from your business growth or your family time. Automation isn't a luxury; it's your freedom.
hidden_cost.pillar3_description: The Google algorithm doesn't wait for anyone. The longer you stay on an old platform, the harder it becomes to ever catch up. Don't wake up a year from now wishing you started today.
hidden_cost.warning_heading: Don't wake up a year from now wishing you started today.
hidden_cost.warning_text: Your competitors are moving fast. Every day you hesitate is a day they pull further ahead.
hidden_cost.warning_button: Stop the Bleeding. Book Your Audit →

ourstory.headline: Dutch Innovation. Tenerife Roots.
ourstory.narrative1: We moved from the Netherlands to Tenerife because we saw a massive gap: local businesses losing hours to manual work and thousands in revenue to outdated digital tools. We saw the potential, and we moved here to fix it.
ourstory.narrative2: We don't just build websites; we build AI-driven systems that act as your most efficient employee, saving you time and money.
ourstory.founder1_desc: He turns complex data into high-performance digital machines that convert traffic into predictable profit.
ourstory.founder2_desc: He knows exactly what it takes to lead a business, optimize operations, and scale local brands.
ourstory.image_alt: Job Eland and Rodney - Founders of Solon Digital

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Discover the latest trends, tips, and strategies for growing your digital presence.
insights.post1_title: Is Your Website a Digital Ghost? The Hidden Cost of Outdated Web Design in Tenerife
insights.post1_excerpt: Tenerife is a land of opportunity, but many businesses are still living in the digital stone age. Discover why outdated websites are your biggest hidden expense.
insights.post1_section1_title: The "Mañana" Trap: Why Speed is Your Greatest Competitor
insights.post1_section1_content: In the Tenerife web design market, we often hear "mañana." But online, there is no tomorrow. Statistics show that 40% of visitors will leave a site if it takes more than 3 seconds to load. At Solon Digital, we build "Lava-Fast" systems.
insights.post1_section2_title: Stop the WhatsApp Chaos: Automate or Die
insights.post1_section2_content: Are you still handling every single booking, inquiry, and question manually through WhatsApp? Smart Websites now act as your 24/7 Digital Employee.
insights.post1_section3_content: We moved from the Netherlands to Tenerife because we saw local legends losing money to bad tech. With background in AI integration and experience running 6 successful PT Studios, we combine Northern European efficiency with deep Tenerife market understanding.
insights.post1_section4_title: The Blunt Truth: Is Your Site Bleeding Money?
insights.post1_section4_content: A website should be an investment that pays for itself within months. If you aren't on Page 1 of Google, you don't exist for the 100,000+ tourists searching for your service right now.
insights.post1_section5_content: Stop guessing and start scaling. We're offering a Free Digital Growth Audit. We'll identify exactly where your current site is losing you money.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collection_intro: We may collect the following data:
privacy.data_forms: Any data you submit through forms
privacy.retention_text: We retain your data no longer than necessary for the purpose for which it was collected.
privacy.sharing_text: We do not share your data with third parties unless necessary for our service or legally required.
privacy.cookies_text: Our website uses cookies. See our cookie policy for more information.
privacy.right_modify: Have your data corrected or deleted
privacy.rights_contact: Please contact us at the email address above.
privacy.security_text: We take appropriate measures to protect your data.
privacy.changes_text: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro_text: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze our website. By clicking 'Accept', you agree to our use of cookies. You can adjust your preferences at any time.
cookies.what_are_text: Cookies are small text files stored on your computer or mobile device when you visit our website.
cookies.why_use_text: We use cookies for the following purposes:
cookies.why_improve: To improve your experience on our website
cookies.why_analyze: To analyze our website and monitor usage
cookies.types_intro: We use different types of cookies:
cookies.type_essential_text: These cookies are necessary for our website to function
cookies.type_analytics_text: These cookies help us understand how you use our website
cookies.consent_text: By using our website, you agree to our use of cookies. You can change your preference at any time.
cookies.manage_text: Most modern browsers allow you to accept or reject cookies. Check your browser settings for more information.
cookies.contact_text: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at info@solondigital.com
